text:
The is an elusive family from an unidentified place beyond the Walls.

History

Annie Leonhart always followed her father's orders, only going against his will once. Exhausted by her harsh training, she beat him over and over. After that event, her father could not walk without a limp but he was so proud of his daughter's strength he decided to intensify her training sessions.

Story

Wall Sheena, Goodbye arc

While she investigates on Carly Stratmann's disappearance, Annie remembers of her father's training and the time she rebelled against him. Despite his treatment, she expresses her wish to finish her mission and come back home.

Members

Trivia

Leonhart is derived from the Spanish word león and the Dutch word hart. These words combined literally translate to Lionheart. Lionheart is a nickname that is given to someone who is a great warrior.
